stemHtml:
Given:

MH = magnetic heading of the aircraft
Omega = yawing rate of the aircraft

The yaw damper computer sends a motion order to the rudder if…

options.a: the derivative of MH with respect to time is not equal to zero.
options.b: the derivative of Omega with respect to time is equal to zero.
options.c: the derivative of MH with respect to time is equal to zero.
options.d: the derivative of Omega with respect to time is not equal to zero.
